creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
bash is required for /usr/local/bin/any2djvu, which is installed by
djvulibre. I recommend to add option WITH(OUT)_ANY2DJVU, so one could
disable it, getting rid of unneeded script and thus useless dependency.

-- 
Best regards,
  Dmitry Marakasov               mailto:amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
